response:
Yes, Tionne Watkins and Park So-yeon have both been members of a girl group.

- **Tionne Watkins** was a member of the American girl group **TLC**, which included her as T-Boz.
- **Park So-yeon** was a member of the South Korean girl group **T-ara**, which she led as the main vocalist.

Thus, both were members of girl groups.
